title: Anatomy of an LSTM Cell
description: A visual breakdown of the internal gates and data flow within a single Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) unit, showing how it processes information to remember or forget.
relationships: The forget gate decides what information to remove from the cell state. The input gate and candidate state work together to update the cell state with new information. The output gate controls what information from the updated cell state is output as the new hidden state.
